THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLEAN, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONG, KEVIN $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,090.00, DEFENDANT FRAUDULENTLY MISREPRESENTED THAT THE MOTORCYCLE HAD CLEAN TITLE. DAMAGES ARE WHAT PLAINTIFF PAID LESS THE VALUE OF THE MOTORCYCLE AND AN ALLOWANCE FOR THE COST AND TIME OF RESTORING TITLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
